title: CMF Project Metadata
description: Project-level data model for the CMF Project Management system (FR-VID-11). Represents a single video project with its organizational metadata, pipeline state summary, and asset counts.

client.description: Client or campaign name for grouping. Nullable.

folder_id.description: FK to Folder. Null means project is at root level.

folder_path.description: Computed full folder path for display (e.g., '/Clients/Tony/Q2 Campaign'). Read-only.

tags.description: Free-form tags for cross-folder filtering. Convention: 'key:value' pairs encouraged.

arc_type.description: Narrative arc type from the source beat cluster (DEP-VID-001).

beat_count.description: Number of beats in the project's beat cluster.

total_duration_sec.description: Total video duration in seconds. Computed from manifest. Null before manifest exists.

thumbnail_url.description: URL to the project thumbnail (typically first beat's keyframe). Presigned S3 URL.

status.description: High-level project status. Derived from pipeline state but simplified for dashboard display.

pipeline_id.description: Linked pipeline instance ID (DEP-VID-025). Null if pipeline not yet started.

manifest_id.description: Linked Remotion manifest ID (DEP-VID-002). Null before manifest is constructed.

beat_cluster_id.description: Source beat cluster ID (DEP-VID-001). Null if project created empty.

pipeline_state.description: Current pipeline state from DEP-VID-025 (16-state enum). Null if no pipeline started. Must match DEP-VID-025 current_state enum exactly.

review_progress.description: Beat-level review progress summary from DEP-VID-027.

total_cost_usd.description: Total generation cost in USD, rolled up from pipeline.

total_regenerations.description: Count of beat regenerations triggered for this project.

has_active_editor_session.description: True if an FR-VID-10 editor session (DEP-VID-028) is currently active for this project.

asset_counts.description: Counts of generated assets by category. Computed from S3 listing.

archived_at.description: ISO 8601 archive timestamp. Null if not archived.
